---
title: "4.6 - Advanced - Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Sentiment Analysis"
date: 29 July 2024
description: "An introduction to fine-tuning LLMs using BERT, in Python."
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=fine_tuning_llm.html">

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here](fine_tuning_llm.html).
